description.content: Building Collaboration Format issue tracking
Returns BIM Collaboration Format (BCF) topics for a project. BCF topics represent issues, clashes, comments, and design queries tied to specific locations or objects in BIM models.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new BCF topic (issue) in the project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Returns details for a specific BCF topic.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates a BCF topic status, assignee, or other fields.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
File and document management
Returns files and folders within a project directory.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Upload a file to a project

request.name: Upload a file to a project

description.content: Uploads a file to the specified project folder. Supports BIM model files (IFC, RVT, SKP, NWD, NWC), drawings (PDF, DWG), and documents.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) File binary content
Target folder path
Returns metadata for a specific file.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Project management
Returns a list of Trimble Connect projects accessible to the authenticated user.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new Trimble Connect project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Returns detailed information for a specific project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates mutable project properties such as name, description, and status.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
User and team management
Returns all users and their roles within a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Trimble Connect API enables integration with Trimble's cloud-based construction collaboration platform. Provides access to project data, BIM models, document management, issues (BCF Topics), and team collaboration features for construction project management. Trimble Connect acts as the BIM collaboration hub integrating Tekla, SketchUp, and third-party tools.
